description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring alternating parallel stripes of light gray and black. The sides are solid black, giving the block a bold, modern appearance. The striped pattern on the top is evenly spaced and runs the full length of the block, suggesting a decorative or functional design. The block appears dense and heavy, likely made from a solid stone or concrete material. Its clean lines and uniform pattern indicate it is manufactured rather than naturally formed. The overall look is utilitarian yet visually striking, suitable for urban environments.
description: A rectangular stone block with a flat, striped gray and black top and solid black sides, giving it a modern, bold appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat striped top surface and solid black front face.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the block and the continuation of the striped pattern across the top.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the striped top and solid black rear face visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the block's depth and the striped top pattern.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a decorative barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a leveled gravel base
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surfaces appear clean and well-maintained, with no signs of erosion or discoloration.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or spaced as a standalone barrier or seating block
